query:
SELECT 
  a.id AS assessment_id,
  a.claim_id,
  LEFT(a.narrative_json, 300) AS narrative_preview,
  a.fraud_risk_level,
  a.damage_severity,
  a.estimated_cost,
  a.created_at
FROM ai_assessments a
WHERE a.narrative_json LIKE '%mandava%'
   OR a.narrative_json LIKE '%Mandava%'
   OR a.narrative_json LIKE '%school%'
   OR a.narrative_json LIKE '%School%'
   OR a.stage_outputs_json LIKE '%mandava%'
   OR a.stage_outputs_json LIKE '%Mandava%'
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
